basic_details.short_information: Maharshi Valmiki College of Education Delhi (MVCE Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates with M.Ed./M.A, Postgraduate degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 22-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MVCE Delhi official website du.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.pay_scale: Academic Pay Level 10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Matrix

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MVCE Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: MVCE Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
